description: Style NoteThe stitch detailing and colour of this rakishly designed shirt from Provouge adds casual styling to your ensemble, while the fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes for an effortlessly awesome look!Product DetailsBlack shirt with a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not tumble dryFlat dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
